positive: A whimsical, detailed illustration of a bioluminescent forest at night. Giant glowing mushrooms, tiny fairy lights suspended in the mist, and a gentle stream flowing over mossy rocks. Style: Studio Ghibli meets Art Nouveau, highly detailed, vibrant jewel tones, volumetric lighting, digital painting.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, grainy, noise, monochrome
